seo.title: Why Should Energy Traders Know About RBOB?
seo.description: Crack spreads measure the profitability of refining crude oil into products like gasoline. This article explains how the RBOB/Brent crack spread works, what drives it, and how traders use it to hedge risk or speculate on energy market movements.
